details.test: Task 1: Enroll in Electrical Lockout/Tagout Level 1 May 2026 online session
Task 2: Add cut-resistant gloves and safety glasses to cart
Task 3: Request a quote for three qualifying products
Task 4: Compare two gloves and wishlist the lighter one
Task 5: Build learning plan with three courses totaling 6-10 hours
Task 6: Filter glove, add 2 units to cart, and access datasheet
Task 8: Save two products to favorites and rename wishlist
Task 9: Prepare cart with 5 units of one product and 1 unit of another
